rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped background citation when the authors summarize prior psychological-newness research on category knowledge and new-product understanding. The 2008 paper then pivots to a different focal lens (product-level newness and temporal construal) and builds its hypotheses mainly from Hoeffler (2003) and construal-level theory. There is no clear evidence of direct reuse of the cited paper's mechanisms, measures, or empirical design in this article.
